name: Lightspeed Golf Course Management API
what_it_does: Lightspeed Golf REST API for golf course management, tee sheet, and point-of-sale platform. Enables AI agents to manage tee time reservations and tee sheet availability, handle golf membership billing and accounts, process pro shop retail transactions, manage F&B point-of-sale, access revenue reporting and analytics, integrate with handicap systems and tournament software, manage golf cart inventory, and connect course data with marketing and CRM platforms.
use_cases: Managing tee time reservations and tee sheet from course operations agents
Processing membership billing and renewal from golf club management agents
Accessing revenue analytics across golf, F&B, and retail from reporting agents
Integrating tee sheet data with booking platforms from distribution agents
not_for: Non-golf hospitality without golf-specific tee sheet and handicap requirements
Multi-sport facilities without golf as primary focus
Golf simulator facilities without full course operations
best_when: A golf course, country club, or golf management company using Lightspeed Golf wants AI agents to automate tee time management, membership billing, POS operations, and revenue reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Member billing and dues data requires careful handling. Automated tee sheet changes affect member experience. Pro shop inventory automation must handle serialized and non-serialized items correctly.

auth.notes: Lightspeed Golf uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Location-level credentials with module-specific scopes. Part of broader Lightspeed Commerce API ecosystem. Developer portal with documentation. Rate limits documented per endpoint.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — golf course enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly per-location pricing; bundle pricing for golf + F&B + retail
pricing.notes: Montreal, Quebec Canada. Listed on NYSE (LSPD). Lightspeed Golf acquired from GolfNow (NBC Sports) rebranding. Multi-vertical commerce platform. Competes with foreUP, Jonas Club Software for golf course management. Strong global presence.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Member billing and tee time revenue automation requires accuracy
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 via Lightspeed developer portal
Part of broader Lightspeed ecosystem — API unified across Golf, Retail, Restaurant
Tee sheet automation must handle booking rules, member priority windows, and overbooking prevention
Multi-region data residency — verify location-specific data storage for GDPR compliance
Handicap integration separate from API — USGA/R&A handicap systems have own access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Golf course member and financial data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 scoped. Multi-region data residency. Listed company with strong compliance posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Member and financial data. PCI-DSS, SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. NYSE-listed company.
